title: Innsbruck、Tyrol — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Innsbruck、Tyrolの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

InnsbruckはTyrolにある人口132,493の都市です。A stunning Alpine city surrounded by snow-capped peaks, a two-time Winter Olympics host with the iconic Golden Roof, imperial architecture, and year-round outdoor adventure.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
